initiatives.name: Riot Act Books
initiatives.description: A radical bookstore fostering mutual aid and community power through accessible literature and cultural programming. They provide a space for political education, resource sharing, and movement building while creating a hub for radical literature and community organizing.

initiatives.name: Binghamton PLOT
initiatives.description: We are a collective of advocates organizing in the Southern Tier around issues of race, class and gender!

initiatives.name: Binghamton Tenants Union
initiatives.description: Connecting tenants in Broome County to each other & sharing resources so renters can stay in their homes.

initiatives.name: Binghamton Food Rescue
initiatives.description: We provide rescued food from local farmers' markets at no cost to individuals and organizations that would otherwise not have access to enough healthy, affordable food.

initiatives.name: PM Press @ 21 Emma St
initiatives.description: The @pmpressorg warehouse in Binghamton, NY. Updates on PM events and mutual aid in the 607
